fixApproach: Create a pure `chunkText(text: string, maxLength: number): string[]` function that: (1) guards maxLength<=0 with a throw, (2) returns [] for empty/whitespace input, (3) returns [text] if within limit, (4) splits at `/[.!?]\s+/` sentence boundaries, greedily packing sentences into chunks ≤ maxLength, and (5) hard-splits any single sentence > maxLength into maxLength-sized pieces. Write co-located vitest tests covering empty/whitespace, under-limit, multi-sentence packing, over-long single-sentence hard-split, invariant checks (no chunk exceeds limit, content preservation).
steps: Create `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.ts` with JSDoc header and exported `chunkText(text, maxLength)` implementing the specified semantics

Create `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.test.ts` with vitest imports covering: empty input, whitespace-only, under-limit single-chunk, multi-sentence packing, over-long single-sentence hard-split, no-chunk-exceeds-maxLength invariant, content-preservation invariant, maxLength<=0 throws
Run `npm run test` (vitest) to confirm all tests pass
Run `npm run build:web` to confirm the build succeeds with the new module
summary: Add `chunkText` utility and co-located vitest tests at `apps/web/src/lib/chunk-text.ts` / `.test.ts`
